prompt: 把'警告'两个字做成卡片样式：黑色边框、内边距5px、圆角3px

assertions.name: contains-span-tag
assertions.description: Output should contain an HTML span tag

assertions.name: contains-border
assertions.description: Output should contain border CSS property

assertions.name: contains-padding
assertions.description: Output should contain padding CSS property

assertions.name: contains-border-radius
assertions.description: Output should contain border-radius CSS property

assertions.name: uses-english-quotes
assertions.description: Style attribute must use English quotes, not Chinese quotes

assertions.name: contains-target-text
assertions.description: Output should contain the target text
